overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in a white coat exploring a dimly lit industrial facility. The character walks through narrow metal corridors and enters a large chamber containing a massive mech being repaired with sparks flying.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial maintenance corridor with large storage container

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow industrial corridor alongside a large metal container

entered.detail: massive dark industrial container with ribbed surface and warning stripes
metal storage racks with boxes and equipment
painted safety line running along the corridor floor
rows of fluorescent lights hanging from the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, dimly lit industrial corridor. A large metal container dominates the right side while overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the concrete floor marked with yellow safety lines.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial corridor ceiling with exposed piping

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at ceiling lights and industrial piping

agents.ego_description: tilts head up to observe the ceiling infrastructure, then continues walking toward the corridor exit

entered.detail: linear arrangement of bright industrial ceiling lights
exposed ventilation and cable ducts running along the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts up to reveal the industrial ceiling with exposed piping and light fixtures. The character continues walking as the corridor opens ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial chamber with elevated walkways and staircases

events.description: exits narrow corridor into open industrial chamber with metal walkways

agents.ego_description: turns right and enters a larger open industrial area with metal walkways and staircases

entered.detail: elevated metal platform with safety railings
metal staircase leading to upper platform
perforated metal floor plates with industrial texture
raised work platform with metal framework

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the corridor into a spacious industrial chamber with metal walkways and staircases. The floor transitions to metal grating as the space opens up with multi-level platforms.

scene_state.functional_zone: mech repair bay with active welding sparks

events.description: large mech comes into view with sparks flying from repair work

agents.ego_description: walking toward a large mech being repaired with sparks flying, observing the workers nearby

notable_agents.action: worker standing near the mech observing the repair work

entered.detail: massive humanoid robot suspended in the center of the chamber with sparks flying from its chest
metal work table with tools and equipment
thick industrial cables snaking across the floor
bright welding sparks emanating from the mech's chest area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a massive mech in the center of the chamber, with bright sparks flying from repair work on its chest. Workers are visible in the background near metal walkways and industrial equipment.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance area surrounding the mech

events.description: begins circling around the mech to view it from different angles

agents.ego_description: circling around the mech to observe it from different angles, approaching the metal stairs

notable_agents.action: worker kneeling near equipment monitoring the mech repairs

entered.detail: steep metal staircase with handrails leading to upper level
metal work chair near the equipment

segments.scene_description: The character circles around the mech, viewing the repair work from different angles. The camera passes by metal stairs and industrial equipment while workers continue monitoring the sparks flying from the mech.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a vast, high-ceilinged repair chamber. It begins with the character walking past a large metal container under flickering fluorescent lights, following yellow safety lines on a concrete floor. As the camera tilts upward to reveal a network of exposed ceiling pipes, the narrow passage opens up and the floor transitions into metal grating. The scene then expands into a spacious industrial hall filled with multi-level platforms and staircases, leading the character toward a massive mech emitting bright sparks from its chest. Finally, the camera circles the towering machine, passing by industrial equipment and workers who monitor the ongoing repairs from the surrounding walkways.
